# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
- Idea: Project using skillsmith
- Stage: existing
- Stack: click, pytest, arch-business-logic, arch-ui, arch-unknown

## Required Context
- `AGENTS.md`
- `.agent/STATE.md`
- `.agent/lessons.md`
- `.agent/project_profile.yaml`
- `.agent/context/project-context.md`
- Trusted publisher public keys: none
- Publisher signature scheme mode: auto

## Workflow
- Search `.agent/skills/` for relevant task guidance.
- Use `.agent/workflows/` and tool-native commands for repeatable flows.
- Verify before claiming completion.
